aespa debuted on November 17, 2020 with 'Black Mamba'.
Karina is the leader of aespa.
Winter's birth name is Kim Min-jeong.
Giselle spent much of her childhood in Japan.
The group's official greeting is 'Be my æ! Hello, we are aespa!'
aespa's concept centers around the connection between members and their avatars.
Kwangya is an important setting in aespa's storyline.
Nævis is a key character in aespa's fictional universe.
aespa has collaborated with Warner Records for global promotions.
The members have appeared on numerous variety shows and YouTube content series.
aespa has won multiple Rookie of the Year awards since debut.
The group has received several Daesang (grand prize) awards.
aespa was introduced as SM Entertainment's first girl group in six years after Red Velvet.
Karina trained for about four years before debuting.
Winter was discovered through an audition at a dance festival.
Giselle had one of the shortest training periods among SM Entertainment idols before debuting.
Ningning joined SM Entertainment through the SM Rookies program.
Before debuting, Karina was known online by the nickname 'Yu Jimin ulzzang.'
